top_signals.title: Bank of England Official Says Oil Crisis Clouds Rate Outlook
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England may know where inflation is headed, but it has a much harder time knowing where oil—and interest rates—are headed. That was the message from Bank of England policymaker Swati Dhingra on Friday, as the ongoing Middle East energy crisis continues to complicate the outlook for interest rates. "If you ask me what's my interest rate decision next month going to look like or in the future, I think that's very hard to say, because the big elephant in the room here is what happens to the energy crisis," Dhingra said during…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI Boom or Political Play? Trump Channels Defense Funds Into Dying Coal Plants
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration is set to channel nearly $700 million in federal funds into the U.S. coal industry Thursday, invoking a Korean War-era statute to prop up existing power plants, finance new construction, and push open a California export terminal that has been blocked for nearly two decades. The centerpiece is $425 million distributed under the Defense Production Act to 13 existing coal plants across West Virginia, Kentucky, North Carolina, Indiana, Tennessee, Arkansas, Arizona, Oklahoma, North Dakota, and Wisconsin. Another $75 million…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine says drone hit nuclear fuel facility near Chernobyl
top_signals.summary: The director general of the IAEA, said the incident was "deeply concerning as it occurred at a facility containing large amounts of nuclear material.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Next up, taxes: Crypto tax legislation circulated ahead of House Ways and Means Committee hearing next week
top_signals.summary: As cryptocurrency-related bills from regulating stablecoins to the market as a whole take center stage — now comes how to tax those assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
